overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game showing an armored character navigating a dark industrial spaceship interior. The character interacts with control panels and machinery to open a large airlock door, explores the area beyond, and manipulates environmental systems in a teal-lit, metallic corridor.

events.description: character crouches down to interact with a floor-level access panel
character stands and operates the orange holographic display terminal

agents.ego_description: crouching to access a lower control panel, then standing to operate an orange display terminal

entered.detail: grated metal flooring with yellow safety markings
illuminated orange holographic display screen on a metal stand
yellow-topped metal railings along the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a metal industrial platform and approaches a control station, crouching to interact with a floor-level panel before standing to operate an orange holographic display.

scene_state.functional_zone: airlock corridor with large circular hatch

events.description: character moves from the control platform toward the large airlock door
character stops at the airlock door to examine the red warning display

agents.ego_description: walking along the metal walkway toward a massive circular airlock door and examining the warning display

entered.detail: massive circular metal hatch with concentric rings and locking mechanisms
red-lit digital warning screen mounted on the wall beside the door

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the industrial walkway toward an imposing circular airlock door, stopping to examine a red warning display panel mounted on the wall beside it.

scene_state.functional_zone: airlock control station with fuse panel

events.description: character opens the electrical fuse panel and pulls a large lever to unlock the door
large circular airlock door rotates and slides open with mechanical sounds
character walks through the now-open airlock door into the passage beyond

agents.ego_description: opening an electrical fuse panel, pulling a large lever to unlock the airlock, then proceeding through the opening door

entered.detail: wall-mounted metal cabinet containing a large red-lit lever mechanism
dark passage visible through the opening airlock door

segments.scene_description: The character interacts with a wall-mounted electrical panel to unlock the airlock, triggering the massive circular door to open, then proceeds through the doorway into the passage beyond.

events.description: character climbs up a metal ladder to an upper maintenance platform
character interacts with an orange control terminal on the upper level
character climbs back down the ladder to the main level

agents.ego_description: climbing a ladder to an upper maintenance platform to access a control terminal, then descending back down

entered.detail: vertical metal ladder attached to the platform structure
elevated metal walkway with railings above the main floor
large industrial crates and containers on the upper level

segments.scene_description: On the far side of the airlock, the character ascends a metal ladder to an upper maintenance platform, interacts with a control terminal, then climbs back down to the main level.

events.description: character walks into the darker corridor beyond the airlock
character turns around and walks back toward the airlock door

agents.ego_description: exploring a dimly lit corridor beyond the airlock, then returning to the door area and approaching storage lockers

entered.detail: long dark passage with minimal lighting extending into the distance
wall-mounted metal storage cabinets with orange accents

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dark corridor illuminated by sparse overhead lights, then returns to the airlock area and approaches a set of wall-mounted storage lockers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark industrial spaceship interior as the character navigates from a control station through a massive airlock into a maintenance corridor. It begins on a metal platform where the character crouches at a floor panel before operating an orange holographic display. As the character moves along the industrial walkway, the scene shifts toward an imposing circular airlock door, pausing briefly at a red warning display before the door is triggered to slide open. The camera then follows the character through the threshold and up a metal ladder to an upper maintenance platform to access a terminal, before descending back to the main level. Finally, the perspective drifts through a dark corridor lit by sparse overhead lights before turning back toward the airlock area to approach a set of wall-mounted storage lockers.
